reason: Backend review checklist for search/storage contract changes.
Verify vector-store and managed-library compatibility remain intact.
Review fallback/error handling behavior for ANN query failures.
Check observability labels and trace attributes stay low-sensitivity.
Review test coverage and regression surface.
Confirm M16 does not violate the original Qdrant backend contract.
Confirm ANN query behavior remains compatible with M15 payload/sync semantics.
Primary requirements and acceptance criteria for M16.
Review technical boundaries, fallback rules, and rollout shape.
